elements.title: Isfahan Quran
elements.contents: ... that the Isfahan Quran (detail pictured) was written in a style that required a particularly high level of calligraphic skill?

elements.title: an inactive gold mine
elements.contents: ... that the US Army blew up an inactive gold mine in secret after finding about 500 cases of dynamite, creating a fireball about 200 feet (61 m) in length?

elements.title: Maria Kalinina
elements.contents: ... that Maria Kalinina was so revulsed by playing the villain in a horror movie that she become a vegetarian and a yoga instructor?

elements.title: future history
elements.contents: ... that works presenting the future history of humanity have been penned since at least the late 18th century?

elements.title: Jaimie Robinson
elements.contents: ... that Jaimie Robinson became an All-Big Ten athlete just as her father and older brothers had before her?

elements.title: a former equestrian facility
elements.contents: ... that a photograph of a girl at a former equestrian facility and a monument blown up by the IRA served as the basis for a statue in Ballymun?

elements.title: Evie MacDonald
elements.contents: ... that a campaign by Evie MacDonald and her family helped to stop minors like her needing a family court to access gender-affirming care?

elements.title: Mr. Hockey: The Gordie Howe Story
elements.contents: ... that the sports biopic Mr. Hockey: The Gordie Howe Story was considered an unusual production choice for the Hallmark Channel?

elements.title: Swinomish totem pole
elements.contents: ... that the Swinomish totem pole depicts traditional Native American figures—and Franklin D. Roosevelt?
